source_pr.title: statistics: add mutex for Handle.globalMap and Handle.feedback
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #29181

Problem Summary:
There exists potential data race when accessing `Handle.globalMap`/`Handle.feedback` concurrently.

### What is changed and how it works?
Add mutex for `Handle.globalMap` and `Handle.feedback` respectively. Each time we want to update `Handle.globalMap`/`Handle.feedback`, lock the mutex first.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to leaked global/shared state between tests. Global state must be reset/restored between tests. This PR stabilizes it by: There exists potential data race when accessing `Handle.globalMap`/`Handle.feedback` concurrently.
